issues.issue: Assume statements are allowed only in component types
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'int' and '<error>', but must be of the same type
named thing must be an expression with a type
It is recommended that assume statements be named. (Hint: an identifier may be placed between the "assume" keyword and the quoted description.)
